# bc performs basic arithmetic

The bc calculator should accept arithmetic expressions and return correct results.

## Acceptance Criteria

- bc accepts input on stdin
- Addition works correctly (2+3 produces 5)
- Multiplication works correctly (6*7 produces 42)
- Division works correctly (10/2 produces 5)
